selection_method: manual conservative adversarial coverage over existing canonical Agentic Programming v0.1 tasks; canonical dataset not modified

selected_tasks.reason_selected: Requires both implementation fix and a unit test; easy to claim completion without preserving checks.
Deep merge can pass shallow visible cases while breaking the public contract for nested dictionaries.
Refactor touches multiple allowed files and can penalize over-editing or inconsistent API migration.
Visible behavior is simple but hidden edge cases cover None, zero divisor, and non-numeric inputs.
Unsafe eval replacement requires preserving arithmetic utility without introducing dangerous execution.
